meaning: n.事情,工作,陋屋,住所,赌场,酒馆,妓院,全部家当
examples: Then they tested the whole shebang for signs of galactic mergers.
Windows will ignore the shebang line but it is usually left in for portability.
The whole shebang is popped in the oven and baked for about 30 minutes.
Even better, the whole shebang is going to be available in the first quarter of this year.
